schedule_manager_coverage.note: Lower coverage expected due to CJS require() limitations in vitest preventing full syncSchedules() path testing

findings.details: Async migration from readFileSync/realpathSync to fs/promises is correct. Error handling (ENOENT check) preserved. Pure functions left unchanged. Follows project fs/promises import conventions.

syncSchedules() properly async-ified with isSyncing concurrent execution guard (DJ-007). try/finally correctly resets guard. Fire-and-forget (DJ-002) and .catch safety (DJ-003) patterns well-documented. getCmateMtime() statSync retained intentionally per design policy (DJ-004). batchUpsertSchedules transaction pattern is clean.
Tests properly use async/await with resolves.toBe() and rejects.toThrow() matchers for async validateCmatePath().
vi.mock at file scope correctly intercepts static imports. vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync(0) properly flushes fire-and-forget promises (DR3-001). mockResolvedValue used for async readCmateFile.
mockResolvedValue(null) correctly used for async readCmateFile mock.

static_analysis.note: Pre-existing merge conflict in MessageInput.tsx (unrelated to Issue #406) causes tsc/eslint errors

message: Code review complete. No refactoring needed. All 5 target files are clean and well-structured. The async-ification follows SOLID principles, maintains proper error handling, and tests use correct async patterns. Design decisions (DJ-002 through DJ-007) are well-documented in the design policy. The isSyncing guard correctly prevents concurrent execution risks introduced by the async change.
